title: 04556_Do_Perceptually_Aligned_Gradients_Imply_Robustness
positive_examples: Promoting Perceptually Aligned Gradients (PAG) leads to more robust models, which can improve the safety of AI systems in real-world applications that affect human lives.
The findings can potentially pave the way for standard training methods for obtaining robust classifiers without adversarial training, making AI systems more reliable.
negative_examples: The sensitivity of neural networks to minor corruptions raises significant safety concerns when deployed in real-world applications.
The paper discusses the potential for adversarial attacks, which can be exploited to cause misclassification in critical applications, posing risks to safety and security.
